title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at HomeLane - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at HomeLane - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the HomeLane family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HomeLane:
HomeLane is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane!
